description_long: This house features a striking modern design with bold black and white geometric patterns on its exterior walls, contrasted by a deep red gabled roof. The main structure is two stories tall, with a prominent central chimney and a smaller attached building with a matching red roof. The property sits on a rectangular concrete base, with minimal landscaping including a few shrubs and rocks near the foundation. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, adding to the contemporary aesthetic, and the entryway is set back beneath a covered porch area. The attached structure appears to function as a garage or auxiliary space, accessible from the main driveway. The overall look is clean, angular, and visually dynamic, making it stand out in an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with bold black and white geometric walls, a red gabled roof, and an attached garage on a concrete base. Asymmetrical windows and minimal landscaping enhance its contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main house with geometric wall patterns, red gabled roof, and attached garage on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the red roof, and minimal landscaping along the concrete base.
description_view_2: Rear and opposite side view displaying the garage's full roof, the back of the house, and the geometric wall design.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the garage's plain white wall and the rear of the main house with the red roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry beneath a covered porch, with steps and minimal decorative elements.
